LanguageData.FB_DestroyBrainModeDesc: Doubles research speed. Neural overheat is stored on each pawn. Every 500 research points accumulated by that pawn inflicts 3 toxic damage directly to their brain. Outside the synapse core, the accumulated heat dissipates over one day.
LanguageData.FB_SynapseCorePawnAlreadyReserved: {PAWN_labelShort} is already reserved for another synapse core.
